meta.title: Candy Shop — Where Furry Art Lives
meta.description: A creative marketplace for furry artists, makers, and collectors

hero.title: Where furry art lives.
hero.subtitle: Commissions. Prints. Fursuits. Digital art. Built by artists, for everyone who loves what they make.

sections.categoriesIntro: A quick read on what you can find inside the store.
sections.categoriesNote: Six corners of the catalog, each with its own rhythm.

artists.label: For creators
artists.title: Your art deserves a real home.
artists.description: Sell commissions, manage your queue, ship merch, and grow your audience — without platform fees eating your work.

fans.label: For collectors
fans.title: Find your next favorite artist.
fans.description: Commission your dream piece, collect prints, discover new creators, and support the artists who make the fandom what it is.
